query_normalized: measuring epistemic resilience of llms under misleading medical context linguistics
rationale: The paper focuses on constructing and evaluating a Chinese pediatric medical LLM (PediatricsGPT) and does not investigate how LLMs handle misleading medical contexts or measure epistemic resilience, nor does it provide a baseline, methodology, or related population for that specific construct. Hence it does not meet any inclusion criteria (a‑f).
